sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_union (id INTEGER, tag ENUM('foo', 'bar'));
UPDATE test_union SET tag = union_tag(union_value(k := 'bar')) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, tag FROM test_union WHERE tag = union_tag(union_value(k := 'foo'));
SELECT union_tag(union_value(k := 'bar')) AS current_tag FROM test_union;
